findings.evidence: `mathlib/Mathlib/Algebra/Group/Subgroup/Map.lean:545` defines `MulEquiv.subgroupMap`, `:529` defines `MulEquiv.subgroupCongr`; Mathlib uses exactly this pattern in `stabilizerEquivStabilizer` at `mathlib/Mathlib/GroupTheory/GroupAction/Basic.lean:263`.
findings.fix: Package `conjUnderlying` as a `MulEquiv (E ≃ₜ E) (F ≃ₜ F)`, prove `(Deck p).map ... = Deck q`, and define `conjHomeomorph` via `MulEquiv.subgroupMap` followed by `MulEquiv.subgroupCongr`.
findings.issue: `conjHomeomorph` hand-rolls the subgroup equivalence induced by an ambient multiplicative equivalence of homeomorphism groups.

summary: The new material is not an outright duplicate, but the main subgroup equivalence reimplements Mathlib's existing subgroup-transport API instead of building on it.
